heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6910 Authorization of appropriations
text: Amounts necessary to meet lease and other obligations, including maintenance requirements, incurred by the Secretary of the Interior and assigned to the Secretary of Transportation under this subchapter may be appropriated to the Secretary of Transportation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)691040:813(a)., as added , , .Pub. L. 90–264, title I, § 113(a)Pub. L. 97–125, § 3(3)95 Stat. 1669Dec. 29, 1981In this section, the text of 40:813(a) (last sentence) is omitted as obsolete.
